title: Fermented Fluffy Kenyan Carrot Stir-fry
description: A monsoon-inspired dish featuring fermented carrots in a fluffy texture and cooked with raw-friendly stir-fry techniques.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup fish sauce or soy sauce

instructions: Wash and finely chop the onion.
Combine ginger, chopped onion, oil/ghee in a large pot or wok over medium-high heat. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add shredded carrots to the pot with salt and stir until evenly coated. Add fish sauce, fermented rice vinegar, and sugar. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Reduce heat to low, cover the pot and let it cook for about 15-20 minutes or until the carrots are soft but still slightly crunchy on top (this is a pressure cooking technique).
Serve hot as a side dish.
